ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audit_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the audit entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audit entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the audit entity (e.g., department, division, agency) */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary contact person for the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_findings" (
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit finding */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit entity the finding belongs to */,
  "finding_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit finding */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for the audit finding */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action plan for the finding */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the finding */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel responsible for addressing the finding */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for addressing the finding */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the finding was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the finding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_findings_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES audit_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_findings_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit finding the recommendation belongs to */,
  "recommendation_description" TEXT /* Description of the recommendation */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel who approved the recommendation */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date of recommendation approval */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_plans" (
  "action_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action plan */,
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit finding the action plan belongs to */,
  "action_plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the action plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the action plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the action plan */,
  "responsible_personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel responsible for the action plan */,
  "progress_percentage" INTEGER /* Progress of the action plan in percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the action plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_plans_responsible_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_plans_finding_id FOREIGN KEY ("finding_id") REFERENCES audit_findings ("finding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "action_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action plan the task belongs to */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_action_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_plan_id") REFERENCES action_plans ("action_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the personnel */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the personnel belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the personnel */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the personnel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the personnel record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the personnel record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the assignment belongs to */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel the task is assigned to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task assignment */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the task was completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit document */,
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit finding the document belongs to */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the audit document */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path or URL of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_documents_finding_id FOREIGN KEY ("finding_id") REFERENCES audit_findings ("finding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance requirement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance requirement */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation the requirement belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance status */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance requirement the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of compliance */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of compliance status */,
  "responsible_personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel responsible for the compliance status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_status_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES compliance_requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_status_responsible_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance requirement the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "sent_to" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel or group the alert was sent to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES compliance_requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sent_to FOREIGN KEY ("sent_to") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "sent_to" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel or group the notification was sent to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_to FOREIGN KEY ("sent_to") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the user notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the user notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
